reverted_detail: FollowUpAnswer (src/polaris_v6/followup/schema.py) — LOAD-BEARING: used as `response_model=FollowUpAnswer` on POST /runs/{run_id}/followup (followup_router, mounted in app.py:113). Pydantic v2 emits the class docstring as the model's JSON Schema `description`; confirmed empirically that app.openapi() carried the docstring in components.schemas.FollowUpAnswer.description before revert and does NOT after. Reverted the class docstring so the OpenAPI contract is byte-unchanged.

ScopeDecision (src/polaris_v6/scope/decision.py) — LOAD-BEARING: used as `response_model=ScopeDecision` on POST /scope/check (scope_router, app.py:110). Docstring flowed into OpenAPI components.schemas.ScopeDecision.description (confirmed via live app.openapi()); reverted.

TemplateContent (src/polaris_v6/templates/registry.py) — LOAD-BEARING: used as `response_model=list[TemplateContent]` and `response_model=TemplateContent` on GET /templates and GET /templates/{id} (templates_router, app.py:117). Docstring became OpenAPI schema description; reverted.

FrameDefinition (src/polaris_v6/templates/registry.py) — LOAD-BEARING: nested inside TemplateContent.frame_manifest, so it appears in TemplateContent's $defs and thus in the OpenAPI components.schemas.FrameDefinition.description reachable via the /templates routes (confirmed present in live app.openapi() before revert, absent after). Reverted.
result.collection: 16738 tests collected, 11 errors (exactly at baseline 16738/11; the 11 collection errors are pre-existing import errors unrelated to the docstrings, and the count is unchanged by the 4 reverts). py_compile passed on all 14 changed .py files.
